title: We want to hear from you! ( community feedback event)
excerpt: Today we are hosting an intimate zoom session for our community share thoughts and feedback about our community forum. You will also have the opportunity to meet our amazing community experts! If you would like to join o…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Today we are hosting an intimate zoom session for our community share thoughts and feedback about our community forum. You will also have the opportunity to meet our amazing community experts! If you would like to join our event at 4pm est register here.

posts.author: EMorton (Erik Morton)
posts.cookedHtml: Will there be another of these events sometime soon, and also will it be possible to get more than a few hours notice (I know that I’m posting well after it occurred, but ‘we want to hear from you!’ but also stating that the event is the same day doesn’t really give the impression that you wanted to hear from us.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Emorton! You are always welcome to send us a message and give us your feedback. We are always working to make our community as useful to members as we can. We did give some time notice before this event and hope to have feedback hours every quarter for our events.
